items.title: Oracle’s stock soars as analyst predicts ‘pure upside’ ahead for the battered cloud provider
items.description: Oracle shares have been battered by OpenAI jitters and a broader software selloff, but one analyst argues the market has overcorrected.

items.title: Alphabet’s $15 billion bond deal may have a highly unusual component
items.description: As tech companies look to finance their hefty spending plans, they’ve been offering bonds with longer maturities.

items.title: Micron’s stock falls on fears about Nvidia’s new chips, but investors may be overreacting

items.title: Workday’s stock falls as CEO change sounds like ‘really bad news’ to this analyst
items.description: Investor sentiment toward software stocks is low, and now Workday is replacing a CEO who was known for having good sales relationships.
